---
title: "LQAS Monitoring Dashboard"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: fill
    theme: flatly
    source_code: embed
    self_contained: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)
library(arrow)
library(DT)
library(dplyr)

# Load your data
data_file <- "data/final/lqas_dashboard_input.csv"

if(file.exists(data_file)) {
  dt <- as.data.table(fread(data_file))
  data_available <- TRUE
  cat("✅ Loaded:", nrow(dt), "rows\n")
} else {
  data_available <- FALSE
  cat("❌ No data file found\n")
}

if(data_available) {
  total_records <- nrow(dt)
  pass_count <- sum(dt$status == "Pass", na.rm = TRUE)
  fail_count <- sum(dt$status == "Fail", na.rm = TRUE)
  pass_rate <- round(pass_count / total_records * 100, 1)
}
